name: cutr
description: Video upload platform for anime editors

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.embed:local: node --input-type=module -e "const id=process.argv[1]; if(!id){console.error('Usage: npm run embed:local -- <videoId>'); process.exit(1)} console.log('Embed player: http://localhost:5173/embed/'+id); console.log('Direct API:  http://localhost:3001/embed/'+id);"
